color_semantics.TEAL: quantum reality (antisymmetric fermion wavefunction, node on diagonal, statistical separation, exchange correlation)
color_semantics.CRIMSON: classical expectation / boson enhancement (distinguishable particles, symmetric wavefunction, diagonal ridge, no node)

metadata.note: Card 07. Exclusions: no Slater determinant, no helium exchange-integral J/K algebra, no spin-statistics-theorem proof.
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)
